title: Minecraft Gold
description:
Light Vanilla Pack with Ships and Distant horizons in mind
basically a lite version of minecraft silver, made to run with 2500 ram
body:
Vanilla Pack that adds Immersive Portals, Trains, and expands upon the Land, Caves, Sea and skies, as well as The Nether, The End and The Deep!


Transport and Storage
 
- Carts
- Backpacks
- Gliders
- Grappling Hook
- Ships
- Create Trains
